subject: fix(splash): abort health-check fetch on unmount per TIMER_LEAKS pattern
body:
`pattern-audit` flagged src/App.tsx as deviating from glow-props TIMER_LEAKS
contract — the health-check fetch had no cleanup. Added an AbortController,
passed the signal to fetch, and abort in the effect cleanup. AbortError is
filtered so the status doesn't flip to "error" when the abort is deliberate.

Tags: splash, pwa-patterns, cleanup, react
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: abort health-check fetch on unmount per TIMER_LEAKS pattern
